# Normalization

Stabilize library-size and technical scale differences.

**12 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `sctransform` | `beta` | `external` | SCTransform regularized negative-binomial variance stabilization. | [sctransform](../generated/sctransform.md) |
| `weave_graph_diffusion_normalize` | `experimental` | `native` | Bounded spatial diffusion of library-size-normalized expression. | [weave_graph_diffusion_normalize](../generated/weave_graph_diffusion_normalize.md) |
| `weave_rank_stabilize` | `experimental` | `native` | Tie-aware within-observation rank stabilization with structural zeros. | [weave_rank_stabilize](../generated/weave_rank_stabilize.md) |
| `weave_robust_pearson_residual` | `experimental` | `native` | Prior-shrunk, clipped negative-binomial Pearson residual normalization. | [weave_robust_pearson_residual](../generated/weave_robust_pearson_residual.md) |
| `weave_spatial_median_normalize` | `experimental` | `native` | Library-size scaling with spatial local-median shrinkage. | [weave_spatial_median_normalize](../generated/weave_spatial_median_normalize.md) |
| `arcsinh_transform` | `production` | `native` | Cofactor-scaled inverse hyperbolic sine transform. | [arcsinh_transform](../generated/arcsinh_transform.md) |
| `clr_per_cell` | `production` | `native` | Centered log-ratio transform with a stable pseudocount. | [clr_per_cell](../generated/clr_per_cell.md) |
| `library_size_scale` | `production` | `native` | Scale every observation to a fixed library size. | [library_size_scale](../generated/library_size_scale.md) |
| `log1p_cp10k` | `production` | `native` | Library-size normalization (CP10k) + log1p. | [log1p_cp10k](../generated/log1p_cp10k.md) |
| `r_lognorm` | `production` | `native` | R-side library-size log1p normalisation (container spike). | [r_lognorm](../generated/r_lognorm.md) |
| `sqrt_transform` | `production` | `native` | Variance-stabilizing square-root count transform. | [sqrt_transform](../generated/sqrt_transform.md) |
| `tfidf_l2` | `production` | `native` | TF-IDF weighting followed by per-observation L2 normalization. | [tfidf_l2](../generated/tfidf_l2.md) |

## Decision notes

### `arcsinh_transform`

- Stabilize library-size and technical scale differences.
- Cofactor-scaled inverse hyperbolic sine transform.

- Stabilize library-size and technical scale differences.

- Stabilize library-size and technical scale differences.
